title: Venezuelan Plantain Fritters
description: A crispy, sweet and savory fritter filled with plantain and spices, inspired by Venezuelan cuisine. Enjoy as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, mix together the mashed plantains, flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add the beaten eggs to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Dust each ball with flour and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Fry the fritters in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot. Optional: sprinkle with shredded cheese.
